spec_match.rationale: The main demo and live probes are excellent, but the worker font loading demo is completely simulated using setTimeout logs rather than running a real Web Worker, which fails to prove the worker-side exposure contract.

interactive.rationale: Provides interactive pattern toggles and live font loading, but the worker demo is a faked simulation instead of a real interactive execution.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Matches the migration framing and helpfully illustrates the before/after transition.

edge_cases.rationale: Gracefully falls back to the legacy pattern if the FontFaceSet constructor is not supported, ensuring the demo remains functional.

references.rationale: Includes ChromeStatus link, though the spec link is missing from this page.

design_system.rationale: Visually distinct before/after panels and clear layout aligned with the design system.

openQuestions.title: Replace simulated Worker demo with a real Web Worker execution
openQuestions.detail: The 'Worker font loading use case' demo uses setTimeout to mock/simulate worker logs and canvas measurements. It should spawn a real Dedicated Worker, construct a FontFaceSet there, load the font, render to an OffscreenCanvas, and pass the actual text metrics back to the main thread, matching the other robust concepts in this feature.

openQuestions.title: Add CSS Font Loading spec link to references
openQuestions.detail: Add a link to the CSS Font Loading spec in the references section for consistency with the other concept pages.
